uses that number to identify an individual’s records in all CCW data files (e.g., 
Medicare claims and enrollment, T-MSIS claims, and MDS assessment data). 

This number does not change during a beneficiary’s lifetime, and CCW uses each number only once. 

The BENE_ID is specific to the CCW and is not applicable to any other identification system or data 
source. 

SHORT NAME: BENE_ID 

LONG NAME: BENE_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 15 

FILE(S): Clinical (final and raw)
